retrieved_result: Just three pull-ups: Too many for women in the Marine Corps? \"Just three pull-ups: Too many for women in the Marine Corps? The Marine Corps reports that most women in recruit training are unable to do the minimum three pull-ups. As the US military moves toward allowing more women in combat roles, this raises questions about physical standards. By Brad Knicker
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result concerns military physical fitness standards and gender, not database query optimization.
